title: Mobile Optimized
description: An optimalization modpack for android phones with pocket edition like controls
body:
A good optimalization modpack for mobile users with pocket edition like controls.

## Performance
-  This modpack uses good optimalization mods like sodium which triples your fps and gives stable frametime
- Built on fabric which is a lightweight modloader, and you can add other mods into it

## Compatibility
- Doesn't work with pocket edition beacuse it is a java edition modpack
- Works with mobile java edition launchers:
> - [Zalith Launcher 2](https://zalithlauncher2.com/) (recommended)
> - [Fold Craft Launcher](https://github.com/FCL-Team/FoldCraftLauncher/releases)
> - [Pojav Glow Worm](https://github.com/Vera-Firefly/Pojav-Glow-Worm/releases)
- Linux wayland (with libgc and a touch screen)
- Windows (minimum windows 7 and need a touch screen)

# Setup
### Pojav glow worm
- Just install the modpack with the builtin modpack installer
- In the settings video and renderer section, click on the renderer and choose MobileGlues
- In the mobile glues renderer settings choose prefer multidraw indirect in the multidraw emulation option
- After starting the game make sure to disable the cursor
### Zalithlauncher 2
- Install it with the builtin modpack installer
- Click the instance's cogwheel, than click configure, scroll down and turn on the enable control proxy option
- Install [Mobile glues](https://github.com/MobileGL-Dev/MobileGlues-release/releases) renderer plugin (download the .apk from the assets, than install it)
- In the settings renderer section, click on the global renderer and choose MobileGlues
- In the mobile glues renderer settings choose prefer multidraw indirect in the multidraw emulation option
- After launching the game click the cogwheel, than choose the mouse at the top, and in the control mode choose tap control
### Others
- Ask chatgpt i only have these two launchers installed
